alternative_parents.description: Aromatic heteropolycyclic compounds containing a pyrrolo[2,3-d]pyrimidine ring system, which is an pyrrolopyrimidine isomers having the 3 ring nitrogen atoms at the 1-, 5-, and 7-positions.
alternative_parents.name: Pyrrolo[2,3-d]pyrimidines

alternative_parents.description: Heterocyclic compounds containing a pyrrole ring bearing a carboxamide.
alternative_parents.name: Pyrrole carboxamides

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a heteroaromatic ring that carries a carboxamide group.
alternative_parents.name: 2-heteroaryl carboxamides

alternative_parents.description: Aromatic compounds containing a pyrimidine ring substituted at the 2-position with a halogen atom.
alternative_parents.name: 2-halopyrimidines

alternative_parents.description: Heterocyclic compounds containing a pyrrole ring substituted at one or more positions.
alternative_parents.name: Substituted pyrroles

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the acyl chloride functional group.
alternative_parents.name: Aryl chlorides

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing an amide derivative of carboxylic acid, with the general structure RN(R1)C(R2)=O (R1-R2 any atom but H).
alternative_parents.name: Tertiary carboxylic acid amides

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing an aromatic ring where a carbon atom is linked to an hetero atom.
alternative_parents.name: Heteroaromatic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an heterocycle with at least one nitrogen atom and one carbon atom linked to each other.
alternative_parents.name: Azacyclic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a bond between carbon a pnictogen atom. Pnictogens are p-block element atoms that are in the group 15 of the periodic table.
alternative_parents.name: Organopnictogen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a bond between a carbon atom and an oxygen atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organooxygen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a nitrogen atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organonitrogen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a chemical bond between a carbon atom and a chlorine atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organochlorides

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Organic compounds containing a five-member heterocyclic compound with five nitrogen atoms, and two nitrogen atoms at positions 1 and 2 (Pyridazines), 1 and 3 (Pyrimidines), or 1 and 4 (Pyrazines).
class.name: Diazines

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as pyrimidinecarboxamides. These are compounds containing a pyrimidine ring which bears a carboxamide.

direct_parent.description: Compounds containing a pyrimidine ring which bears a carboxamide.
direct_parent.name: Pyrimidinecarboxamides

intermediate_nodes.description: Compounds containing a pyrimidine ring which bears a carboxylic acid group (or a derivative thereof).
intermediate_nodes.name: Pyrimidinecarboxylic acids and derivatives

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Compounds containing a pyrimidne ring, which is a six-member aromatic heterocycle which consists of two nitrogen atoms (at positions 1 and 3) and four carbon atoms.
subclass.name: Pyrimidines and pyrimidine derivatives

superclass.description: Compounds containing a ring with least one carbon atom and one non-carbon atom.
superclass.name: Organoheterocyclic compounds
